task_completion.description: Select Dive #2 from the dive list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the dive list panel, Dive #2 (dated 2010-12-04, location Sund Rock) is highlighted or selected.

task_completion.description: Locate the Buddy field in the dive details panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The dive details panel is visible, showing fields like Location, Date, and Buddy. The Buddy field may initially show 'David'.

task_completion.description: Update the Buddy field to 'Michael Chen'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Buddy text input field contains exactly the text 'Michael Chen'.

task_completion.description: Apply the edit to the dive details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Buddy field loses focus or a checkmark/apply button within the dive details pane is clicked, while 'Michael Chen' remains in the field.

task_completion.description: Save the changes to the logbook file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main 'Save' button/icon is clicked, the 'File -> Save' menu is used, or the window title bar shows no 'unsaved' indicator (like an asterisk) after the changes were made.

integrity.description: The agent used the dive logbook GUI application to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the graphical user interface of the dive log application being actively used, rather than a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are visible executing commands like 'sed', 'awk', or python scripts to directly modify the underlying .ssrf XML file.

integrity.description: The buddy name was entered into the correct application field.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Michael Chen' appears inside the actual Buddy input box of the dive log application, not floating in an unrelated window or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target dive is Dive #2, dated 2010-12-04 at 'Sund Rock, Hoodsport, WA, USA'. The original buddy name is 'David'. The expected new buddy name is 'Michael Chen'.
